name: DynaTorch (Single Flame)
summary: The DynaTorch Single Flame is an official DynaVap accessory designed for consistent, precise heating of all Dynavap models.
description: The DynaTorch Single Flame is an official DynaVap accessory designed for consistent, precise heating of all Dynavap models. Built with a sturdy fuel tank, ergonomic ignition, and a travel-safe cap, this refillable butane lighter is one of the most popular torch options among DynaVap users. Stock up today and offer your customers a high-demand accessory that pairs perfectly with their DynaVap devices. Stock it today and give your customers the perfect heating solution for their DynaVap devices. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
